RQ1.title: Music Discovery Friction
RQ1.executive_summary: Users face significant barriers when trying to find and discover new music on Spotify, primarily due to ineffective music recommendations, lack of personalization and control, and technical issues with the app. The algorithm-driven playlists, app performance, and user interface require improvement to address these issues.

jtbd_summary.situation: When looking for new music to listen to
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover new music that they will enjoy
jtbd_summary.outcome: to find new music that matches their taste

observed_workarounds: Using a different music streaming service
Manually creating playlists with mixed songs

key_findings.finding: Poor music recommendations are a primary barrier to music discovery
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: 70% of users reported poor music recommendations, Cluster 172: 60% reported poor weekly discovery recommendations

key_findings.finding: Lack of control over recommendations is a significant issue
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: 30% of users reported lack of control over recommendations, Cluster 172: 40% reported lack of control over weekly discovery

key_findings.finding: Technical issues with the app, such as poor performance and user interface issues, also hinder music discovery
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 158: users reported a significant decline in their music discovery experience due to technical issues

actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced algorithm-driven playlists with user-controlled preferences
User-controlled filters and sorting options for recommended music

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Optimize app performance and user interface
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Improved app performance, intuitive user interface, and reduced technical issues

RQ2.title: Algorithmic Repetition & Looping in Automated Mixes
RQ2.executive_summary: Users experience significant repetition in automated mixes like Smart Shuffle and Daily Mixes, with many reporting the same songs being played repeatedly, leading to a poor user experience. The issue is attributed to flaws in the shuffle feature, lack of control over shuffle, and poor algorithmic recommendations.

jtbd_summary.situation: Users are listening to automated mixes like Smart Shuffle and Daily Mixes
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover new music and have a reliable and enjoyable music listening experience
jtbd_summary.outcome: to improve the overall music listening experience and avoid repetition

observed_workarounds: Creating a new playlist with specific songs
Using a different music streaming service
Manually creating playlists with similar songs

key_findings.finding: Users experience significant repetition in automated mixes
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 14, Cluster 4, Cluster 27, Cluster 537, and Cluster 536

key_findings.finding: Flaws in the shuffle feature and lack of control over shuffle contribute to the issue
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 14 and Cluster 536

key_findings.finding: Poor algorithmic recommendations also contribute to the issue
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 4

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve the shuffle feature to reduce repetition
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users need a reliable and enjoyable music listening experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle algorithm with user controls

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance algorithmic recommendations to improve music discovery
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users need to discover new music
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Advanced music recommendation engine with user feedback mechanisms

RQ3.title: Spotify Recommendation Algorithm Sentiment Analysis
RQ3.executive_summary: Users exhibit mixed sentiments towards Spotify's recommendation algorithms, with key areas of dissatisfaction including poor music recommendations, lack of control over recommendations, and perceived biases. However, many users appreciate the music discovery features and the ability to find new music that aligns with their tastes.

jtbd_summary.situation: When looking for new music to listen to
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover new music and artists that fit their tastes
jtbd_summary.outcome: to easily find new music and artists with an improved algorithm

observed_workarounds: Using a different music streaming service

key_findings.finding: Poor music recommendations are a major source of dissatisfaction
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: 70% of users reported poor music recommendations

key_findings.finding: Lack of control over recommendations is a significant issue
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 6: 30% of users reported lack of control over recommendations

key_findings.finding: Users want an improved artist and genre algorithm
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 935: 96% of users reported needing algorithm improvement

actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced algorithm that incorporates user feedback and listening habits
Features that allow users to fine-tune their recommendations, such as separate song likes and dislikes

RQ4.title: User Discovery Methods & Behaviors
RQ4.executive_summary: Users employ various approaches to discover new music on Spotify, including manual search, custom playlists, and features like Discover Weekly and AI DJ. However, users often experience issues with shuffle functionality, playlist management, and autoplay, which can hinder their music discovery experience. The evidence suggests that users desire more control over their music listening experience, effective playlist management, and accurate algorithmic recommendations.

jtbd_summary.situation: When listening to music on Spotify
jtbd_summary.motivation: to discover new music and have a seamless music listening experience
jtbd_summary.outcome: to find new music that they will enjoy and have more control over their music listening experience

observed_workarounds: Creating a new playlist with specific songs
Using a different music streaming service
Manually creating playlists with mixed songs

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with shuffle functionality, particularly when shuffling to songs from different playlists
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 14: 60% of users experience issues with shuffling to different playlists

key_findings.finding: Users desire more control over their music listening experience, including effective playlist management and accurate algorithmic recommendations
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 154: 50% of users experience issues with songs disappearing from playlists, Cluster 172: 60% of users experience poor weekly discovery recommendations

key_findings.finding: Users experience limitations with the free version of the service, including limited features and lack of control over music experience
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 146: 60% of users experience limited features in the free version

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve shuffle functionality to allow users to shuffle within a specific playlist
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users desire more control over their music listening experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced shuffle feature with playlist-specific shuffling

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance playlist management features to prevent songs from disappearing and allow for easier editing
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Improved playlist management with song recovery and easier editing features

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Develop more accurate algorithmic recommendations for weekly discovery
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced weekly discovery feature with improved algorithmic recommendations

RQ5.title: Feature-Specific Performance of Spotify Discovery Features
RQ5.executive_summary: Spotify users express dissatisfaction with the performance of specific discovery features, including Smart Shuffle, Release Radar, and Discover Weekly, citing issues with unexpected song transitions, duplicate songs, and playlist management, highlighting opportunities for improvement to enhance the overall user experience.

jtbd_summary.situation: When using Spotify's discovery features, such as Smart Shuffle, Release Radar, and Discover Weekly
jtbd_summary.motivation: to have a seamless and enjoyable music listening experience with relevant song recommendations
jtbd_summary.outcome: to discover new music, manage playlists effectively, and avoid issues with song transitions and duplicates

observed_workarounds: Creating a new playlist with specific songs
Using a different music streaming service

key_findings.finding: Users experience issues with Smart Shuffle, including unexpected song transitions and lack of control
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 14, Cluster 27, Cluster 536

key_findings.finding: Users have difficulty managing their playlists, including adding and removing songs
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 154

key_findings.finding: Users are dissatisfied with the weekly discovery feature, citing poor recommendations and lack of control
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 172

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Improve Smart Shuffle algorithm to reduce unexpected song transitions
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users need a reliable and enjoyable music listening experience with relevant song recommendations
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Enhanced Smart Shuffle algorithm with user-controlled preferences

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance playlist management features to reduce user frustration
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users need to manage their playlists effectively and efficiently
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Streamlined playlist editing and song addition/removal features

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Refine weekly discovery feature to provide more accurate and user-controlled recommendations
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users need to discover new music that is relevant to their preferences
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Personalized weekly discovery feature with user-controlled preferences and feedback mechanisms

RQ6.title: Physical Listening Contexts and Spotify Discovery Features
RQ6.executive_summary: The physical environments in which users listen to Spotify significantly impact the usability and effectiveness of its discovery features. Users seek seamless music experiences tailored to their activities, but current issues like app crashes and slow loading hinder this. Opportunities exist to enhance workout and fitness playlists, improving the overall user experience.

jtbd_summary.situation: Users are engaging in physical activities such as working out, driving, or commuting, and want to listen to music that enhances their experience
jtbd_summary.motivation: To have a seamless and enjoyable music listening experience that motivates and improves their physical activities
jtbd_summary.outcome: To find and listen to music that is tailored to their specific activity, and to have a stable and smooth app experience

observed_workarounds: Using a different music streaming service
Using playlists from other music streaming services

key_findings.finding: App crashes and slow loading hinder the music listening experience
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 211: 60% of users experience app crashing, and 40% experience slow app loading

key_findings.finding: Users seek music playlists tailored to their workout and fitness activities
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Cluster 689: Users want to enhance their workout experience with suitable music, and Cluster 783 and 718: Users create and share playlists for specific workout activities

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want music that motivates and improves their workouts
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Develop personalized workout playlists based on user activity and music preferences

actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want a seamless and smooth app experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Optimize app performance to reduce crashes and slow loading

RQ7.title: Influence of Free-Tier Restrictions and Premium Upselling on Music Discovery Experience and Overall Satisfaction
RQ7.executive_summary: Free-tier restrictions and premium upselling significantly impact users' music discovery experience and overall satisfaction, primarily due to excessive ads, limited song control, and aggressive premium promotion, driving users to seek seamless music listening experiences with fewer ads and more control, potentially leading to premium upgrades or alternative services.

jtbd_summary.situation: Users are listening to music on the free version of a music streaming service
jtbd_summary.motivation: to have a seamless music listening experience with fewer ads and more control over their music experience
jtbd_summary.outcome: to enjoy music without interruptions and have the ability to control their listening experience

observed_workarounds: Using a different music streaming service

key_findings.finding: Excessive ads negatively impact the music listening experience
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Clusters cluster_167, cluster_151, and unrelated_ads highlight user frustration with too many ads

key_findings.finding: Limited song control and aggressive premium promotion lead to user dissatisfaction
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Clusters cluster_139 and cluster_167 mention limitations in the free version and the desire for more control

key_findings.finding: Users seek a seamless music listening experience with fewer ads and more control
key_findings.supporting_evidence: Clusters cluster_18, cluster_139, and cluster_151 emphasize the importance of a seamless music listening experience

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Optimize ad experience to minimize interruptions
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want fewer ads and more control over their music listening experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Implement ad-free or reduced-ad options for free-tier users

actionable_opportunities.opportunity: Enhance free-tier features to improve user satisfaction
actionable_opportunities.unmet_need: Users want more control over their music listening experience
actionable_opportunities.proposed_feature: Introduce features like song rewind or more playlist control for free-tier users
